overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a densely packed cyberpunk city. The player navigates neon-lit streets, crosses an intersection, enters a narrow alley, and takes an elevator up to a residential apartment, showcasing the game's atmospheric lighting and detailed urban environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk residential street with towering apartment blocks

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the residential towers against the night sky
begins walking forward along the sidewalk, transitioning from stationary observation

agents.ego_description: initially standing still looking up at the towering buildings, then beginning to walk along the street

entered.detail: tall teal-colored apartment building with numerous windows and air conditioning units
large modern street light with orange glow in the foreground
vertical pink neon advertisement with silhouetted figures
cylindrical high-rise building with green neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a dramatic upward view of a towering teal residential building in a dense cyberpunk city. The camera pans up to reveal the building's height against a dark sky, then begins moving along the sidewalk. Pink neon billboards and an orange street lamp dominate the foreground, establishing the vibrant neon-soaked atmosphere of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction barriers and overhead pedestrian walkway

events.description: passes by two pedestrians leaning against the wall on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past construction barriers and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: couple leaning against the wall, one with arm around the other

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
elevated walkway with stairs and illuminated advertisements underneath
large vertical sign with 'LIZZIE'S' text in red neon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the sidewalk past red and white construction barriers. An overhead pedestrian bridge looms ahead with glowing advertisements underneath. A couple stands leaning against the wall on the right. The Lizzie's billboard becomes prominent as the camera advances through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: crossing the street using the yellow striped crosswalk
turns right into a narrow dark alleyway away from the main street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right into a narrow alleyway

entered.detail: uniquely shaped high-rise building with irregular balconies and teal lighting
bright red neon sign with Japanese characters spanning across a building bridge
green pedestrian bridge with 'Cannock' signage and product advertisements
dark narrow opening between buildings leading away from the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with a yellow crosswalk. The camera crosses the street, passing under a green pedestrian bridge with 'Cannock' signage. A striking twisted residential tower rises ahead, illuminated by teal lights. The camera then turns right into a dark narrow alleyway, leaving the main street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with warm orange lighting and debris

events.description: enters the dark alley where warm orange artificial lighting replaces neon glow
approaches and enters a building entrance at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley toward a building entrance, passing trash and debris

entered.detail: tall dark building walls creating a narrow corridor
glass door entrance with warm interior lighting visible
folding metal security gate inside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow, enclosed alleyway with warm orange lighting replacing the cool neon glow of the street. Trash and debris litter the concrete ground. The camera moves toward a building entrance at the end of the alley, passing through a glass door into a dimly lit interior lobby with a metal security gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: building lobby with security gate and elevator access

events.description: enters the building lobby through the glass doors
approaches and enters the elevator, pressing the button to ascend

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby, passing the security gate, and entering the elevator

entered.detail: metal elevator doors with call buttons on the side
small metal elevator cab with grating and control panel
digital display panel showing floor selection interface

segments.scene_description: Inside the building lobby, the camera passes through a metal security gate and approaches an elevator. The lighting is dim and warm. The player enters the elevator, revealing a small metal interior with a digital control panel. The elevator doors close as the ascent begins.

events.description: elevator begins ascending as indicated by the floor display changing

agents.ego_description: standing still in the elevator as it ascends to a higher floor

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary inside the elevator as it ascends. The digital control panel displays changing floor numbers with upward arrows. The elevator interior features metal grating walls and exposed ceiling pipes, with dim lighting creating a claustrophobic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment interior with neon accent lighting

events.description: elevator doors open revealing the apartment interior with green neon lighting
moves from dim elevator into room illuminated by green neon tube lights

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator and looking around the apartment space, examining the room

entered.detail: cluttered living space with furniture, boxes, and electronic equipment
vertical green neon tube light mounted on the wall
illuminated vending machine with snacks and drinks
metal security blinds covering the windows

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors open to reveal a dimly lit apartment interior illuminated by vibrant green neon tube lights. The room appears lived-in with scattered furniture, boxes, and a vending machine visible to the left. The camera moves forward to explore the space, passing by a desk area with various items and approaching a window with metal security blinds. The atmosphere shifts from the industrial elevator to a personal, cluttered living space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the vibrant, neon-soaked streets of a futuristic city into the private confines of a cluttered residential apartment. It begins with a dramatic upward gaze at a towering teal building before moving along a sidewalk filled with pink billboards and orange street lamps, passing construction barriers and glowing advertisements. As the camera crosses a wide intersection under a green pedestrian bridge, the scene shifts from the open, brightly lit thoroughfare into a dark, narrow alleyway where warm orange light replaces the cool neon glow. The movement continues through a glass door and a dim lobby, leading into a claustrophobic metal elevator that ascends as floor numbers climb on a digital panel. Finally, the elevator doors open to reveal a lived-in apartment illuminated by vibrant green neon tubes, transitioning the atmosphere from the industrial urban exterior to a personal, cluttered living space.
